{
  "query_mode": "multi_db",
  "planned_steps": [
    {
      "step": 1,
      "action": "query",
      "database": "fylker",
      "purpose": "Get geometry of Finnmark county"
    },
    {
      "step": 2,
      "action": "query",
      "database": "kommuner",
      "purpose": "Get municipality geometries"
    },
    {
      "step": 3,
      "action": "spatial_join",
      "purpose": "Select municipalities that lie within Finnmark",
      "left_source": 2,
      "right_source": 1,
      "join_type": "within",
      "left_geom": "geom_geojson",
      "right_geom": "geom_geojson"
    },
    {
      "step": 4,
      "action": "query",
      "database": "matrikkelenbygning",
      "purpose": "Get building points with municipality number"
    },
    {
      "step": 5,
      "action": "query",
      "database": "flomsoner",
      "purpose": "Get 200‑year flood zone polygons"
    },
    {
      "step": 6,
      "action": "spatial_join",
      "purpose": "Find buildings that intersect 200‑year flood zones",
      "left_source": 4,
      "right_source": 5,
      "join_type": "intersects",
      "left_geom": "geom_geojson",
      "right_geom": "geom_geojson"
    },
    {
      "step": 7,
      "action": "aggregate",
      "purpose": "Count buildings per municipality",
      "source_step": 6,
      "aggregation_type": "count",
      "group_by": ["kommunenummer"],
      "metric_column": "geom_geojson",
      "metric_as": "building_count"
    },
    {
      "step": 8,
      "action": "attribute_join",
      "purpose": "Add municipality name to counts",
      "left_source": 7,
      "right_source": 3,
      "join_keys": ["kommunenummer"]
    },
    {
      "step": 9,
      "action": "sort",
      "purpose": "Order municipalities by building count descending",
      "source_step": 8,
      "order_by": "building_count",
      "order_direction": "desc"
    },
    {
      "step": 10,
      "action": "limit",
      "purpose": "Return top 5 municipalities",
      "source_step": 9,
      "limit": 5
    }
  ]
}
